generated_oml:
instance MotorPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [

]

instance SecondaryPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder for the gearwheel of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot first axis"

    base:desc "Current sensor measuring motor current (I_M) for the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot first axis"

]

instance MotorTorqueSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Torque sensor measuring torque (τ) for the motor of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot first axis"

    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorAngularVelocityDataTransmitted

    base:desc "Angular velocity sensor measuring angular velocity (ω) for the gearwheel of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot first axis"

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [

]

]

]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular position data for motor of MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler, SimulinkEnabler, DashboardVisualizationEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular position data for gearwheel of MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler, SimulinkEnabler, DashboardVisualizationEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor current (I_M) time-series data from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardVisualizationEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorTorqueDataTransmitted

    DTDFVocab:fromData GearwheelTorqueDataTransmitted

    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorAngularVelocityDataTransmitted

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller commanding position, speed, or acceleration inputs to motor and gearboxes for first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for digital twin asset management"
    DTDFVocab:enables AssetManagementService
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for system modeling (Block Definition Diagram and Internal Block Diagram)"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeFrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for simulation of Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre friction models"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeFrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools for simulated versus measured data comparison"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance BlockDefinitionDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for MABI MAX 100 first axis system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance InternalBlockDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for MABI MAX 100 first axis system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for Coulomb-Viscous friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for Stribeck friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for Dahl friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for LuGre friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance RealTimeFrictionModelIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time identification of white-box and black-box friction models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelParametersInsight
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated dashboard visualization of simulated versus measured data"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizedDataComparisonInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Motion accuracy improvement through model refinement"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlAlgorithmUpdateAction
]

instance AssetManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Asset management using Asset Administration Shells"
]

instance FrictionModelParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction model parameters derived from data comparison between simulated and measured data"
]

instance VisualizedDataComparisonInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of simulated versus measured data for comparison"
]

instance ControlAlgorithmUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Update control algorithms based on friction model parameters to enhance robot motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance TwinningProcessMethodologyService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Purpose-driven methodology involving problem identification, asset/model analysis, simulation model usage, and data identification as per [15], refined through use cases in injection molding"
    DTDFVocab:provides ProblemIdentificationInsight, AssetAnalysisInsight
]

instance ProblemIdentificationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Problem identification during twinning process"
]

instance AssetAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Asset and model analysis during twinning process"
]

instance MABIMAX100FirstAxis : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "First axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot, a six-axis serial manipulator used for motion control and friction modeling"
    base:contains MotorPositionEncoder, SecondaryPositionEncoder, CurrentSensorForMotorCurrent, MotorTorqueSensor, GearwheelTorqueSensor, MotorAngularVelocitySensor, GearwheelAngularVelocitySensor, SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCController, BlockDefinitionDiagram, InternalBlockDiagram, CoulombViscousFrictionModel, StribeckFrictionModel, DahlFrictionModel, LuGreFrictionModel, MotorPositionData, SecondaryPositionData, MotorCurrentData, MotorTorqueData, GearwheelTorqueData, MotorAngularVelocityData, GearwheelAngularVelocityData, SystemOutputPositionData
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with sensor data streaming via MQTT for immediate processing and model updates during robot operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM) implementation integrating physical sensors, data traces, processing components (simulation models), and dashboard visualization for the first axis friction dynamics."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As-operated phase, capturing real-time operational data to model wear, load, and temperature effects during robot use."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through deviation analysis between simulated friction model outputs and measured reference data to ensure accuracy for motion control."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data transmission from physical system to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) and SysML standards for asset modeling and system architecture interoperability."
]
